Container.Name: hermes-dashboard
Container.Overview: Web-based dashboard UI for Hermes Agent. Requires a separate hermes-agent container running with the gateway API enabled.
Container.Requires: This template requires a running hermes-agent container with API server enabled. The dashboard connects to the gateway API.

Config.Name: Port: Dashboard WebUI
Config.Description: HTTP port for the Hermes dashboard web interface.

Config.Name: Path: Config
Config.Description: Path to Hermes config directory (should match your main hermes-agent container).

Config.Name: Variable: HERMES_UID
Config.Description: UID for the hermes user. Match to your main hermes-agent container.

Config.Name: Variable: HERMES_GID
Config.Description: GID for the hermes user. Match to your main hermes-agent container.

Config.Name: Variable: UMASK
Config.Description: UMASK for files created by the container.

Config.Name: Variable: GATEWAY_HEALTH_URL
Config.Description: URL to the Hermes gateway health endpoint. Use container name if on same Docker network.

Config.Name: Variable: DASHBOARD_HOST
Config.Description: Host address the dashboard listens on.
